2026-04-14T03:44:23.2190593Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (6521 chars):
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2191332Z ---
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2191848Z description: |
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2193918Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2232480Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2233634Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2234458Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2235264Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2235773Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2235925Z on:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2236253Z   issues:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2236614Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2237014Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2237400Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2237754Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2238422Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2239166Z         required: true
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2239571Z         type: string
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2239953Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2240309Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2240528Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2240706Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2240953Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2241118Z network:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2241458Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2241804Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2242189Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2242437Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2242896Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2243319Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2243788Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2244140Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2244481Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2244846Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2245211Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2245552Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2245915Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2252073Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2252470Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2253078Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2253463Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2253823Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2254244Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2254736Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2255116Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2255488Z   noop:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2255875Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2256315Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2256705Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2257673Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2258724Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2259238Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2259779Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2260201Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2260628Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2261021Z         message:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2261613Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2262305Z           required: true
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2293215Z           type: string
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2293666Z         owners:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2294558Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2295743Z           required: true
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2296171Z           type: string
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2296678Z       steps:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2297070Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2297593Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2298079Z           env:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2298640Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2299315Z           with:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2299685Z             script: |
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2300139Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2300758Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2301192Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2301415Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2302159Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2309458Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2310014Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2310579Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2311321Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2311889Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2312325Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2320359Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2320880Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2321111Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2321347Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2321930Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2322482Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2323155Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2323348Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2324777Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2326123Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2326520Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2326751Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2326951Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2327553Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2328104Z                 try {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2328561Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2329150Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2329736Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2330281Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2330776Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2331419Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2355699Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2356738Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2357187Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2357847Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2359868Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2360304Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2360798Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2361026Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2361201Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2361750Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2362345Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2363396Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2363851Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2364540Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2365166Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2365552Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2365767Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2365943Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2366581Z               try {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2367128Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2367896Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2368580Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2369259Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2369661Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2369870Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2370141Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2370827Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2371394Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2371779Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2371987Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2372363Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2373485Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2374103Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2374712Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2375104Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2375314Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2375493Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2376196Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2377018Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2377618Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2379032Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2379327Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2379534Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2384477Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2385022Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2385545Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2386029Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2386568Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2387554Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2388560Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2389251Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2389774Z                   })
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2390220Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2390532Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2390725Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2391366Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2391991Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2392393Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2392841Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2393057Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2393669Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2394248Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2394582Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2394737Z                 try {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2395225Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2395879Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2396445Z                     body
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2396878Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2397622Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2398447Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2399123Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2399833Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2400233Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2400597Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2400901Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2401056Z tools:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2401405Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2401757Z   github:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2402123Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2403039Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2403818Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2404679Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2405307Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2405590Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2405778Z timeout-minutes: 10

2026-04-14T03:44:23.2427512Z   jobs:

2026-04-14T03:44:23.2428856Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"

2026-04-14T03:44:23.2430396Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2430896Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2431300Z         issues: write

2026-04-14T03:44:23.2435281Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2436215Z           required: true
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2436623Z           type: string

2026-04-14T03:44:23.2439830Z           with:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2440675Z             script: |
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2441121Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2441692Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2442107Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2442303Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2443208Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2443938Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2444435Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2445011Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2445762Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2446360Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2446830Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2447244Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2447698Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2447932Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2448156Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2454581Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2456531Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2456910Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2457118Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2458542Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2459941Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2460400Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2460640Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2460869Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2461513Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2462107Z                 try {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2462777Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2463422Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2464016Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2464557Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2465063Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2465698Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2466977Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2467910Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2468378Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2469063Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2469731Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2470171Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2470684Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2470922Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2471127Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2471711Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2472281Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2472825Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2473251Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2473943Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2474654Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2475041Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2475252Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2475431Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2475858Z               try {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2476597Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2477267Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2478047Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2478724Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2479125Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2479341Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2479636Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2480317Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2480877Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2481264Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2481479Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2481847Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2482739Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2483362Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2483960Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2485717Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2485971Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2486181Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2486922Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2487796Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2488418Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2488866Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2489639Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2489895Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2490450Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2491076Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2491611Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2492113Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2492866Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2493543Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2494285Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2494966Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2495457Z                   })
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2495864Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2496182Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2496383Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2497061Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2497746Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2498171Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2498391Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2498570Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2499143Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2499714Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2500033Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2500187Z                 try {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2502177Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2503089Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2503635Z                     body
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2504038Z                   });
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2504739Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2505563Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2506274Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2507355Z                   return;
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2507811Z                 }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2508218Z               }
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2508454Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2508631Z tools:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2509013Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2509414Z   github:
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2509807Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2510364Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2511308Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2512054Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2512988Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2513264Z 
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2513455Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2514066Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2514771Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T03:44:23.2547078Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
